STRATEGY_ATTACK.title: All-out Attack
STRATEGY_ATTACK.description: Vakuu's Whisper: Prioritize playing Attack cards, targeting the weakest enemy.
STRATEGY_DEFENSE.title: Steady Defense
STRATEGY_DEFENSE.description: Vakuu's Whisper: Prioritize playing Block cards for maximum protection.
STRATEGY_POWER.title: Power Build
STRATEGY_POWER.description: Vakuu's Whisper: Prioritize playing Power cards to set up for later turns.
STRATEGY_RANDOM.title: Pure Chaos
STRATEGY_RANDOM.description: Vakuu's Whisper: Play cards completely at random. Order differs every S/L.
